# Week Review — May 1, 2026
*Generated by Paw 🐾 | Friday, May 1, 2026 | Asia/Kuala_Lumpur*

---

## 🏆 WINS

- **International expansion pivot activated** — FMS is now officially pitching international clients, not just PH/SEA. Stripe confirmed for global payments. Credibility anchors = Spartan Race SEA + 100K+ photos. This reshapes everything from US trip framing to competitor scope.
- **Photo Sharing (Credits) model launched** — New business model formally documented: organizers buy photo credits, participants get photos free. Opens a new segment of organizers who want to offer photos as a participant benefit at no cost to runners.
- **BIPA compliance deep work done** — Full privacy policy drafted with BIPA-compliant biometric section, 6 critical gaps identified and resolved, compliance tracker created and deployed on CEO reports site. PH + SG + US/Illinois regions now tracked in ClickUp. This was blocking the Chicago pitch.
- **US market readiness foundations laid** — Playwright/Chromium installed on VPS, privacy regions mapped, tagline confirmed ("Find your moments."), architecture talking points corrected (FMS stores actual selfie photos + FaceIds).
- **Revenue growing WoW** — FMS Net Revenue +20.4% WoW (₱200,986 for Apr 21–27). 51 events covered in April MTD. Positive net income and cash flow.
- **Competitor intel current and sharp** — Full competitor scan done: GeoSnapshot at 5 PH events, Sportograf locking IRONMAN Vietnam, Photohawk surfaced as new entrant. Threat radar updated.
- **Industry intel captured** — RunSignup RaceDay Photos V3 + AI Results Chat identified as bundling threat. SEA sports tech window confirmed: 12–18 months before funded US/EU competitors fully localize. 6 ClickUp actions created.

---

## 📚 LESSONS LEARNED

- **Deadlines mean nothing without escalation protocols.** Rio's signing was due April 19. It's May 1. 12 days overdue with no documented Plan B until now. The lesson: every critical deadline needs an explicit escalation trigger built in (Day 3 → ping Dave, Day 7 → activate parallel track). Not "we'll see."
- **Compliance is a sales unlock, not a blocker.** BIPA work this week didn't slow down the US push — it enabled it. Van completing the privacy policy draft at midnight is the kind of detail that separates a legit international company from a startup that gets shut out of US events.
- **The new Photo Sharing model is a category shift.** "Free photos for participants, organizers pay" removes the biggest objection in enterprise sales. This needs to be front and center in the Chicago pitch and in Lenli's outreach templates — it's not just a pricing change, it's a value proposition reframe.
- **GeoSnapshot is not waiting.** They added FCC Women's Run PH 2026 this week. They already have a RunRio-linked event (Ayala Philippine Marathon). The gap between "we should lock in Rio" and "GeoSnapshot is already in the door" is closing every week.
- **Conversion rate decline (0.89% Apr vs 1.25% Mar) has not been investigated.** Three months of data now. Tim hasn't dug into the funnel. This can't keep being the thing that gets noted and moved on.

## 🧠 DECISIONS MADE

- **2026-04-23 — International Expansion Pivot:** FMS is now pitching internationally (not just PH/SEA). Stripe covers global payments. Competitor monitoring broadened to global players. US trip is the first international push, not an exploratory trip.
- **Photo Sharing (Credits) business model formalized:** FMS now has two models — Photo Commerce (sell photos, commission split) and Photo Sharing (organizer buys credits, participants get photos free). This opens enterprise and international doors.
- **Tagline confirmed:** "Find your moments."
- **Privacy compliance architecture:** FMS stores actual selfie photos + FaceIds (not just tokens) — all talking points and privacy docs corrected accordingly.

---

## 💬 Paw's Take

Rio still being unsigned at end of Week 1 of the US push is the thing keeping me up. Everything else this week — the compliance work, the new model, the international pivot — is legitimately good. But we're building floors in a house with no roof if Rio doesn't sign. That's the only thing that matters next week.
